description_long: This vending machine features a boxy, rectangular form with a yellow exterior and a large, illuminated display window on the front. Inside the display, several mannequin heads with colorful, stylized wigs are showcased against a red-lit background, giving the machine a unique and eye-catching appearance. The front panel includes various stickers, labels, and what appears to be a product selection and payment area, all situated below the display window. The sides and back of the machine are plain and unadorned, finished in a matte yellow color. The machine is likely constructed from metal with some plastic and glass components, typical of urban vending machines. Its overall design suggests it is intended to attract attention and provide products in a public or commercial setting.
description: A yellow vending machine with a large red-lit display window showcasing mannequin heads with colorful wigs, and a front panel featuring stickers and controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the illuminated display window with mannequin heads, stickers, and control panel details.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a plain yellow surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, featureless yellow panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also plain yellow with no distinguishing features.
attribute_display_panel: A large, rectangular illuminated display window on the upper front, occupying most of the front face, showcasing mannequin heads with wigs and a red background.
attribute_payment_interface: A cluster of small slots and buttons on the lower right front panel, likely for coins and possibly bills, with no visible card reader.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A set of small, round buttons located near the payment interface on the lower right front panel.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, horizontal slot at the bottom center of the front panel, likely for retrieving purchased items.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Multiple stickers and labels on the lower front panel, including Japanese text, colorful graphics, and circular logos.
